description: Lifecycle hooks for dotnet/runtime — AI disclosure guardrails

hooks.command: grep -qE 'gh\s+(pr|issue)\s+(create|comment|edit|review|merge)' && echo 'AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. > [!NOTE]) indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.' >&2; :

PreToolUse.description: Remind to include AI-generated content disclosure when posting to GitHub via gh CLI
